hero.title: Empowering Students to Reach the Top One Percentile
hero.subtitle: Expert coaching for Board Exams, JEE, NEET, NTSE, and KVPY. We transform potential into performance.

why_choose_us.title: Proven Track Record
why_choose_us.description: Consistently producing top rankers in JEE, NEET, and Board Exams year after year.

why_choose_us.title: Expert Faculty
why_choose_us.description: Learn from highly experienced educators who have themselves cracked top exams.

why_choose_us.title: Personalized Attention
why_choose_us.description: Small batch sizes ensure every student gets individual focus and customized mentoring.

why_choose_us.title: Comprehensive Material
why_choose_us.description: Meticulously crafted study materials covering foundational concepts to advanced problem-solving.

why_choose_us.title: Regular Mock Tests
why_choose_us.description: Rigorous testing modeled on actual exam patterns with detailed performance analysis.

why_choose_us.title: Doubt Clearing Sessions
why_choose_us.description: Dedicated time to resolve every query, ensuring complete conceptual clarity.

why_choose_us.title: Parent-Teacher Meets
why_choose_us.description: Regular interactions to keep parents updated on their child's progress and areas of improvement.

why_choose_us.title: Strategic Planning
why_choose_us.description: We don't just teach subjects; we teach exam strategy, time management, and pressure handling.
